user.title: FinTS4
user.description: Set up FinTS access to read balances and holdings.

confirm_tan.title: TAN required
confirm_tan.description:
Your bank requires authentication:

**{challenge}**

For pushTAN / decoupled: confirm the request in your banking app, then click Submit.
For other TAN methods: enter the TAN code below.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the bank. Please check the URL and your credentials.
error.auth: Authentication failed. Please check username and PIN.
error.tan_failed: Sending the TAN failed. Please try again.
error.not_confirmed_yet: The request has not been confirmed in your banking app yet. Please confirm and try again.
